description.zh-Hans: 对图像应用暗角（径向亮度衰减）效果。支持圆形和矩形暗角，带可调节羽化控制。
description.en: Applies a vignette (radial brightness falloff) effect to an image. Supports circular and rectangular vignettes with adjustable feathering.

triggers.zh-Hans: 暗角, 渐晕, 边缘暗化, 镜头暗角
triggers.en: vignette, dark corners, edge darken, lens vignette

exampleUsage.zh-Hans: 为图像添加暗角效果以聚焦中心主体。
exampleUsage.en: Add a vignette effect to an image to focus attention on the center.
